name: spring-voyage-workspace
description: npm workspace root. Exists ONLY to hoist node_modules so connector packages can ship their own web UI (src/Cvoya.Spring.Connector.*/web/) and still resolve shared dependencies (react, lucide-react, @/* from the web project). See src/Cvoya.Spring.Web/next.config.ts and the Web project's tsconfig paths for the full picture. #198.

scripts.lint: npm run --workspace=spring-voyage-dashboard generate-api && eslint src/Cvoya.Spring.Web src/Cvoya.Spring.Connector.*/web --max-warnings 0 --report-unused-disable-directives --cache --cache-location .eslintcache
scripts.lint:fix: npm run --workspace=spring-voyage-dashboard generate-api && eslint src/Cvoya.Spring.Web src/Cvoya.Spring.Connector.*/web --max-warnings 0 --report-unused-disable-directives --cache --cache-location .eslintcache --fix
